notes: HAR-303 captured online-store content catalog/detail/empty reads, blog/page/article create-update-delete success paths with downstream reads, and unknown-id comment moderation/delete userErrors against harry-test-heelo.myshopify.com on 2026-04-26. The runtime test enforces local snapshot empty reads, local lifecycle staging without upstream writes, downstream read-after-write effects, raw mutation log visibility, and comment moderation/delete behavior for snapshot comments.
